source_meaning: closing down of smaller and/or more remote stores

target_meaning: alternative form of 안 봐도 비디오 (an bwado bidio, “for something to be obvious”)

source_meaning: with one voice, in unison, together, simultaneously (of voices, uttered in the same time)
target_meaning: to speak with one voice; to be unanimous
to have no need to distinguish; to be without distinction
